title: My Son And His Wife Took My $110K IRA, Then Evicted Me. So I Framed His Eviction Notice.
description: After using my $110K IRA to pay off my son's mortgage in exchange for a lifetime basement apartment, he and his wife refinanced, took $200K, and evicted me. I sued and won the house. Now they rent from me, and their eviction notice hangs framed on my wall. #RevengeStory #ElderAbuse #Karma
thumb_text: THEY EVICTED ME. NOW I'M THEIR LANDLORD.
pinned_comment: If your son had taken your entire $110,000 retirement and then served you with an eviction notice, would you have sued for the house like I did? Tell me in the comments, I want to hear your story.

thumb_lines.text: MY SON BEGGED FOR MY IRA
THEY PROMISED ME A HOME FOR LIFE, THEN REFINANCED AND EVICTED ME
